eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 08:21 PM ON FEB 13, 2026 Effective until 04:21 AM FEB 14, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Yavapai County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Prescott Police is looking for 86 year old Henry Sheldon last seen wearing a blue jacket, blue jeans, and navy hat driving a 2016 black, Ford Fusion AZ CHN7326. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
